title: season — Eloquent observers
description: One observer — SeasonObserver — enforces the module's write-time invariants: entitlement gating (Small tier lockout), scoping-tuple integrity, date-range validation, one-current-per-tuple invariant, immutability rules on scoping columns post-create, and the guardrails on status transitions.

handles: creating -> populate ULID prefix `sea_`.
creating -> refuse when tenant does NOT hold `sports_seasons` entitlement (returns `SEASON_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Small tier is locked out entirely).
creating -> refuse when start_date >= end_date (returns `SEASON_INVALID_DATE_RANGE`, 422).

creating -> refuse when registration_closes_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_opens_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_closes_at <= registration_opens_at (returns `SEASON_INVALID_REGISTRATION_WINDOW`, 422).

creating -> refuse when registration_closes_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_closes_at > start_date + interval '30 days' (returns `SEASON_REGISTRATION_TOO_LATE`, 422 — registration must close reasonably before season starts, with a 30-day grace for late-start seasons).
creating -> refuse when late_registration_ends_at IS NOT NULL AND late_registration_ends_at <= registration_closes_at (returns `SEASON_INVALID_LATE_WINDOW`, 422).
creating -> refuse when allows_late_registration=true AND late_registration_fee_cents <= 0 (returns `SEASON_LATE_REGISTRATION_FEE_REQUIRED`, 422).
creating -> refuse when allows_late_registration=true AND tenant does NOT hold `season_late_registration` entitlement (returns `SEASON_LATE_REGISTRATION_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Small tier).
creating -> refuse when has_playoffs=true AND tenant does NOT hold `season_playoffs` entitlement (returns `SEASON_PLAYOFFS_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Small + Medium).
creating -> refuse when has_playoffs=true AND playoff_starts_at IS NULL (returns `SEASON_PLAYOFF_START_REQUIRED`, 422).

creating -> refuse when has_playoffs=true AND (playoff_starts_at < start_date OR playoff_starts_at > end_date) (returns `SEASON_PLAYOFF_OUTSIDE_SEASON`, 422 — playoffs must fall within the season window).
creating -> refuse when has_playoffs=true AND playoff_ends_at IS NOT NULL AND (playoff_ends_at < playoff_starts_at OR playoff_ends_at > end_date) (returns `SEASON_PLAYOFF_INVALID_END`, 422).
creating -> refuse when sport_key IS NOT NULL AND tenant does NOT hold `season_sport_scoping` entitlement (returns `SEASON_SPORT_SCOPING_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Enterprise-only for multi-sport tenants).

creating -> refuse when scoping tuple is (organization_id IS NULL AND branch_id IS NOT NULL) (returns `SEASON_BRANCH_WITHOUT_ORGANIZATION`, 422 — a branch-scoped season without an organization doesn't make sense; branch always belongs to an org).

creating -> refuse when branch_id IS NOT NULL AND branch.organization_id != season.organization_id (returns `SEASON_BRANCH_ORGANIZATION_MISMATCH`, 422 — the branch belongs to a different org than the one supplied).
creating -> refuse when organization_id IS NOT NULL AND organization.tenant_id != season.tenant_id (cross-tenant FK smuggling — returns `SEASON_ORGANIZATION_TENANT_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when branch_id IS NOT NULL AND branch.tenant_id != season.tenant_id (cross-tenant FK smuggling — returns `SEASON_BRANCH_TENANT_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when organization.status = 'archived' (returns `SEASON_ORGANIZATION_ARCHIVED`, 409 — cannot create a season under an archived org).
creating -> refuse when branch.status IN ('closed', 'archived') (returns `SEASON_BRANCH_NOT_ACTIVE`, 409).

creating -> consume 1 unit of `season_slot` entitlement against (application_id, tenant_id) — resets annually per calendar year that the season overlaps. Refuses with `SEASON_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` (402) when cap reached (Small=0, Medium=4/year, Enterprise=null).

creating -> refuse status IN ('in_progress', 'playoffs', 'completed', 'archived') at create-time (returns `SEASON_INITIAL_STATUS_INVALID`, 422 — only planned + registration_open are valid initial values; RollSeasonPhaseJob owns automated transitions).
creating -> default status='planned' when unset.
creating -> default is_current=false when unset UNLESS this is the first Season in the scoping tuple (auto-promote to is_current=true so the tenant is never scope-less).
creating -> default sort_order=100 when unset.
creating -> default max_enrollments_per_athlete=1 when unset.
creating -> default allows_late_registration=false when unset.
creating -> default late_registration_fee_cents=0 when unset.
creating -> default has_playoffs=false when unset.

creating -> derive slug from name via HasSlug when unset; guarantee composite uniqueness via (tenant_id, COALESCE(organization_id,''), COALESCE(branch_id,''), slug) partial unique WHERE deleted_at IS NULL.

creating (is_current=true) -> auto-demote every other row with same (tenant_id, COALESCE(organization_id,''), COALESCE(branch_id,''), COALESCE(sport_key,'')) tuple in same transaction; fire SeasonCurrentChanged.
created -> invalidate CurrentSeasonResolver cache keyed by (tenant_id, organization_id, branch_id, sport_key).
created -> fire SeasonCreated.
saving (tenant_id changed post-create) -> refuse with `SEASON_TENANT_IMMUTABLE` (422) — seasons never cross tenants (tenancy isolation).
saving (organization_id changed post-create) -> refuse with `SEASON_ORGANIZATION_IMMUTABLE` (422) — scoping-tuple is immutable; create a new season for the new org.
saving (branch_id changed post-create) -> refuse with `SEASON_BRANCH_IMMUTABLE` (422) — same reasoning; scoping-tuple is immutable.

saving (sport_key changed) -> refuse when Season.status IN ('in_progress', 'playoffs', 'completed', 'archived') (returns `SEASON_SPORT_KEY_LOCKED_AFTER_START`, 409 — audit-critical drift signal); fire SeasonSportKeyChanged when allowed.

saving (is_current flipped true) -> auto-demote every other `is_current=true` row for the same scoping tuple in the same transaction; fire SeasonCurrentChanged; refuse when target Season.status = 'archived' (returns `SEASON_CANNOT_PROMOTE_ARCHIVED`, 409).

saving (is_current flipped false with no sibling is_current=true in the same tuple) -> refuse with `SEASON_LAST_CURRENT` (409) UNLESS the caller passed `--force-no-current` (audit-critical — tenants that legitimately want no active season in a tuple must pass the flag; response header X-Season-Force-No-Current-Ack=required).

saving (status transitioning) -> validate transition against the state machine (see readme §4); refuse invalid transitions with `SEASON_STATUS_TRANSITION_INVALID` (422); fire the correct specific event per transition (SeasonRegistrationOpened / SeasonRegistrationClosed / SeasonStarted / SeasonPlayoffsBegun / SeasonCompleted / SeasonArchived / SeasonRestored) alongside the umbrella SeasonStatusChanged.

saving (status -> registration_open) -> refuse when registration_opens_at IS NOT NULL AND now() < registration_opens_at UNLESS caller has `season.registration.open-early` permission (audit-info — most tenants open on schedule).
saving (status -> playoffs) -> refuse when has_playoffs=false (returns `SEASON_PLAYOFFS_NOT_ENABLED`, 422).
saving (status -> archived) -> refuse when Season.status != 'completed' (returns `SEASON_ARCHIVE_REQUIRES_COMPLETED`, 422 — archive is a terminal transition; must complete first).
saving (status -> archived) -> refuse when is_current=true (returns `CANNOT_ARCHIVE_CURRENT_SEASON`, 409 — promote another season first).

saving (status -> archived) -> refuse when active downstream references exist (Team.season_id + AthleteEnrollment.season_id + Event.season_id + Session.season_id — Wave 3 checks against the dependency-registry config `season.archive.dependency_checks` so future consumers opt in without editing this observer). Returns `SEASON_HAS_ACTIVE_ENROLLMENTS` (409) with the reference counts.

saving (start_date / end_date changed) -> refuse when Season.status IN ('in_progress', 'playoffs') UNLESS caller carries `season.dates.shift` permission (audit-warn — affects enrolled athletes' bookings); refuse when Season.status = 'completed' outright (would corrupt historical invoice period attribution — returns `SEASON_DATES_LOCKED_AFTER_COMPLETION`, 409).

saving (start_date / end_date changed) -> refuse when new range would exclude existing enrolled athletes' session bookings (Wave 3 check — for Wave 3a placeholder the observer only checks Team.season_id references; fuller check lands with session module). Returns `SEASON_DATE_SHIFT_EXCLUDES_ENROLLMENTS` (409).
saving (start_date / end_date changed) -> refuse when has_playoffs=true AND playoff_starts_at falls outside new range (returns `SEASON_PLAYOFF_OUTSIDE_SEASON`, 422).
saving (start_date / end_date changed) -> fire SeasonDatesShifted with before/after snapshots + affected_enrollment_count.

saving (registration_opens_at / registration_closes_at / late_registration_ends_at changed) -> re-validate the registration window rules (opens < closes <= start + 30d; late > closes); refuse invalid + fire SeasonUpdated.
saving (capacity_target changed) -> fire SeasonCapacityTargetChanged with old + new values.
saving (late_registration_fee_cents changed) -> when allows_late_registration=false, force to 0; fire SeasonUpdated with financial-record audit severity (7-year retention).
saving (primary_color changed) -> validate hex via valid_hex_color rule; fire SeasonUpdated.
saving (any other field except *_at / *_by / metadata) -> fire SeasonUpdated when no more-specific event fired (dedupes against the specific-field events above).
updated -> invalidate CurrentSeasonResolver cache when is_current touched; invalidate RegistrationWindowEvaluator cache when any registration timestamp touched.
deleting (soft-delete via archive path) -> handled above under status -> archived.

deleting (hard-delete) -> refuse with `SEASON_PUBLIC_HARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN` (403) unless invoked from the two-person platform-support CLI path (`season:hard-delete` command with `--platform-support` flag). Wave 3a public API never hard-deletes.

forceDeleted (platform-support only) -> fire SeasonDeleted with mode='hard' + cascade-summary payload; note the cascade actually happens at the DB layer (CASCADE FK on tenant_id + RESTRICT on downstream domain FKs — the platform-support flow does its own dependency cleanup first).
restored -> refuse when status != 'archived' before restore (SoftDeletes trait handles trashed check; this refuses restore-of-non-archived edge cases). Fire SeasonRestored.
